# KNG.studio

KNG.studio is a muslin homewear shop in Da Nang, Vietnam. The website is a lightweight catalog for customers to view product categories, available patterns, sizes, price information, shipping notes, gifts, and ordering rules.

Canonical site: https://kngstudio.vercel.app/

## What customers can do

- View the general price and ordering policy image.
- Browse product categories such as short-sleeve sleepwear sets, dresses, and pajama styles.
- Select Size 1 for under 55kg or Size 2 for 55kg to 65kg.
- View available patterns, product photos, model photos, and detailed size chart images.
- Message the shop to order through Instagram or Messenger.

## Contact and ordering

- Instagram direct message: https://ig.me/m/kng.stu_
- Instagram profile: https://www.instagram.com/kng.stu_/
- Messenger: https://m.me/61584468240625
- Facebook page: https://www.facebook.com/p/KNGstudio-61584468240625/

## Agent-readable resources

- Sitemap: https://kngstudio.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- Public catalog summary: https://kngstudio.vercel.app/catalog.json

For the freshest stock state, use the rendered catalog page because the shop updates product availability through the admin site.
